name: Maya Chen
backstory: Maya is a junior studying communications who wants to produce her own lo-fi beats and background music for her TikTok content. She has zero music theory background and has never touched a DAW. She downloaded FL Studio on a whim after watching a YouTube tutorial and immediately felt overwhelmed. She learns from short-form video content and expects instant gratification — if she can't make something cool in 20 minutes, she loses interest.
emotional_triggers: Information overload — more than 3 new concepts at once and she checks out
Feeling 'dumb' compared to people who already know music theory
Losing momentum — nothing kills her interest faster than getting stuck on something technical
existing_strengths: Strong intuitive ear — she knows what sounds good even without knowing why
High energy and enthusiasm when something clicks
Already has a good sense of rhythm from years of dancing
goals: Understand what all the FL Studio buttons do
success_looks_like: Maya produces a 60-second loop she's proud enough to post. She knows the name of at least 3 tools she used and why she used them.
failure_looks_like: Maya gets a long explanation of signal flow theory and closes the chat.
